summary: Iteration 93 - Operational Templates feature testing completed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed for Template CRUD (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/inventory-ledger/templates), Apply endpoint (POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply) with safe-skip behavior, entity type/order type validation, and bulk apply_template action. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Templates page at /templates with template cards showing name/type/assignment/due days/auto-approval, Create Template dialog with all fields, Edit and Toggle Active buttons, filter by entity type, Operations Queue bulk template apply button and dialog with template dropdown.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates - create template with all fields
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates - validates entity_type (422 for invalid)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates - validates applies_to_order_type (422 for invalid)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates - create PO Draft template
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/templates - list all templates
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/templates?entity_type=sales_order - filter by entity type
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/templates?entity_type=sales_order&is_active=true - filter by type and active
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id} - update template fields
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: DELETE /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id} - soft-deactivates template (sets is_active=false)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - validates entity_type mismatch (422)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - returns 404 for inactive template
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - apply to SO creates assignment, due date, approval
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - safe skip: existing assignment skipped
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - safe skip: existing due date skipped
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - safe skip: pending approval skipped
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - generates activity timeline entries
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply - apply to PO Draft works
Backend: Bulk apply_template via operations-queue/bulk-action works for multiple entities
Backend: Bulk apply_template validates template_id is required
Backend: Regression - bulk assign_owner still works (iteration_92)
Backend: Regression - saved-views endpoint works (iteration_91)
Frontend: Templates page at /templates loads correctly

Frontend: Create Template dialog has entity type select (data-testid='template-entity-type')
Frontend: Create Template dialog has order type select (data-testid='template-order-type') for SOs

Frontend: Create Template dialog has due days input (data-testid='template-due-days-input')

Frontend: Create Template dialog has auto-approval toggle (data-testid='template-approval-toggle')

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Template model at lines 4398-4409 with all fields (name, entity_type, applies_to_order_type, default_assignment_to, default_due_days, default_escalation_status, auto_request_approval, is_active)
Backend: CRUD endpoints at lines 4429-4522 (POST, GET with filters, PATCH, DELETE soft-deactivate)
Backend: _apply_template_to_entity helper at lines 4525-4604 implements safe-skip behavior
Backend: POST /templates/{id}/apply endpoint at lines 4607-4634 validates entity/order type compatibility
Backend: apply_template action in bulk endpoint at lines 4358-4370
Frontend: TemplatesPage.js - full CRUD UI with cards, form dialog, toggle/edit buttons
Frontend: TemplateApplySection at InventoryLedgerPage.js lines 1160-1205 shows compatible templates
Frontend: OperationsQueuePage.js lines 225, 276-290 - Apply Template in bulk toolbar and dialog

seed_data_created.templates: Multiple TEST_ prefixed templates created during testing (TEST_Template_*, TEST_Apply_SO_Template_*, TEST_Apply_PO_Template_*, TEST_Bulk_Template_*, etc.)
seed_data_created.existing_templates: Two seed templates found: 'Warehouse SO Standard' (SO, warehouse), 'PO Draft Standard' (PO Draft)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 93 - Operational Templates fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/inventory-ledger/templates for CRUD. POST /api/inventory-ledger/templates/{id}/apply for single entity apply. apply_template action via POST /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue/bulk-action for bulk apply. Template model fields: template_id, name, entity_type (sales_order|po_draft), applies_to_order_type (warehouse|drop_ship|empty), description, default_assignment_to, default_due_days, default_escalation_status, auto_request_approval, notes, is_active. Apply uses safe-skip behavior - won't overwrite existing assignments, due dates, or pending approvals. DELETE performs soft-deactivate (sets is_active=false). Frontend: TemplatesPage at /templates route. TemplateApplySection component in SO/PO detail views filters by entity_type and order_type. Operations Queue bulk toolbar has 'Apply Template' button with template dropdown. data-testid attributes: templates-page, templates-title, create-template-btn, template-type-filter, templates-list, template-card-{i}, template-name-{i}, template-edit-{i}, template-toggle-{i}, template-form-dialog, template-name-input, template-entity-type, template-order-type, template-description-input, template-assign-input, template-due-days-input, template-esc-status, template-approval-toggle, template-notes-input, template-save-btn, bulk-template-btn, bulk-template-select.

validation.422_invalid_entity_type: entity_type must be sales_order or po_draft
validation.422_invalid_order_type: applies_to_order_type must be warehouse or drop_ship

validation.422_entity_type_mismatch: Template entity_type must match request entity_type
validation.422_order_type_incompatible: For SOs, template applies_to_order_type must match SO order_type

apply_template.activity_generation: Creates activity entries for each applied action and system log

features: New Template button opens create dialog
Template cards with name, type badge, assignment, due days, auto-approval
Edit button per card opens edit dialog

OperationsQueueBulkTemplate.location: Bulk action toolbar when items selected
OperationsQueueBulkTemplate.dialog: Shows template dropdown (data-testid='bulk-template-select') and entity count

mocked_apis_note: Email service is mocked. BC API uses demo mode.
